Initializer# init(version:videoTimeScale:videoTime:hostTime:rateScalar:videoRefreshPeriod:smpteTime:flags:reserved:)

iOS 4.0+iPadOS 4.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.4+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 4.0+

```
init(
    version: UInt32,
    videoTimeScale: Int32,
    videoTime: Int64,
    hostTime: UInt64,
    rateScalar: Double,
    videoRefreshPeriod: Int64,
    smpteTime: CVSMPTETime,
    flags: UInt64,
    reserved: UInt64
)
```
